# Stdin and Output Test - Verify Input Processing
# Demonstrates: setstdin, command piping, output validation

# Test basic stdin to stdout pass-through
setstdin "Hello from stdin"
exec cat
stdout "Hello from stdin"

# Test multi-line input
setstdin "Line 1
Line 2
Line 3"
exec cat
stdout "Line 1"
stdout "Line 2"
stdout "Line 3"

# Test empty input
setstdin ""
exec cat
! stdout "."

# Test input with special characters
setstdin "Special: @#$%^&*()"
exec cat
stdout "@#"
stdout "&"
